Sports Scene

Copied

Eventing rider Alex Hua Tian, who won China's first Asian Games equestrian golds last year in Hangzhou, will compete at the Olympics for the fourth time in Paris, after previously appearing in Beijing, Rio, and Tokyo.

CGTN Sports Scene's Greg Laffradi recently talked to the 34-year-old about his expectations for this year's Olympics, the future of his sport in China, and his thoughts on Euro 2024.
